raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tu Klings eſt taifs/ bet
mums jakaunahs/ ittin ka tas
ſchodeen irr/ ar teem Wihreem no
Juha/ un ar Jerusalemes Ge-
diſhwotajeem/ un ar wiſu Isra-
elu/ kas tuwn un kas tahtu irr
eckſch wiſſahm Gemmehim / fur
tu tohs eſt iſdsinnis/ winnu
Pahrkahpschannas deht/ ar ko tee
pretti tew pahrkahpuschees."
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak Klings! mums jakaun-
nahs/ ir muhſeem Kehnizeem /
Leeleem- Kuŋgeem un muhſu
Tehweem / ka mehs pretti tew
effam grehkojſchi."
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet pee ta Klingsa muhſu
Deewa irr tahs Schehlastibas
un tahs Peedohtchanas/ jeptchu
mehs effam winnam prettitur-
rejschees."
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ne effam ta KuNga
muhſu Deewa Balsi elantijſchi/
ka mehs buhtum staigajſchi eeſch
winna Baustibas / ko wiꞥſch
preeſch mums biſ dennis zaur
tawu Kalpu to Praweeſchu
Rohku."
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet wiſs Israels irr ta-
wu Bausti pahrkahpis / un irr juschi.
atkahpis tawai Balsi ne klauti-
Dams. Tadeht irr tas Lahsts
mums uſgabjis/ un ta Sweh-
refchana / kas rakſtita stahw
Mehsus ta Deewa Kalpa Bauſ-"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch irr fau
Wahrdus ſtipri turrejs /
wiꞥſch runnais prett mums/
prett muhſeem Leeſas - Ku-
geim / kas muhs teſaja / lee
Launumu pahr mums wedam
kahds appalſch wiſſu Debbeſi
notizzis/ ittin ka Jerusalemet
nottizzis."
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tavatt ka tas rakſtli
ſtahw eeſch Mohsus Bauſliba
ta tre wiſs tas Launums pa-
mums nahzis. Mehs arri
KUNGa muhſu Deewa Wa-
ne pecluhdsaim/ ka mehs no Gre-
feem buhtum atgreesufschees/
tawu Pateefibu wehra likkufa"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht irr tas KUNGS
mohdrigs bijis ar to Launums
un irr to pahr mums wedtie/
tas KUNGS muhſu Dee-
irr taiſns eeſch wiſſeem tawe-
Darbeem/ ko wiꞥſch darra/
mehs winna Balsi ne effam kla-
fijſcht."
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nu / KuNgs mu-
Deews/ kas tu tawus Lau-
no Egiptes tweddies effi ar ſ-
ru Rohku/ un effi teiw wee-
Wahrdus darrijs / ittin ka-
ſchodeen irr/ mehs effam greh-
tchi/ mehs effam besdeewigi-
juschi."
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ak Klings/ pehz wi-
tawas Taifutbas/ lai jelle ta-
Duſiniba un Bahrsiba atg-
schahs no tawa Jerusale-
Pilstahta/ tawa jivehta Ka-"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
